title: Canonical-order dual-optimization: Mushaf vs Nuzul vs random perms

objectives.J1: sum of squared Mahalanobis transitions between adjacent surahs (lower = smoother)
objectives.J2: Shannon entropy (bits) of 5-bit sign-direction sequence over adjacent transitions (lower = more rhythmic)

nuzul_source: Egyptian Standard Edition (Azhar) chronological ordering, 114-unique validated list
caveat: Historical chronology is uncertain; the Egyptian standard is the most widely-cited reconstruction, used here as best available.

pre_registered_criteria.null: Mushaf not Pareto-better than Nuzul + >=95% of random perms
pre_registered_criteria.MUSHAF_PARETO_DOMINANT: Mushaf Pareto-beats Nuzul AND J1-quantile <= 0.05 AND J2-quantile <= 0.05
pre_registered_criteria.MUSHAF_ONE_AXIS_DOMINANT: Mushaf quantile <= 0.05 on exactly one of J1, J2
pre_registered_criteria.side_effects: no mutation of any pinned artefact; outputs under expE17 only
